summary: Evidence bundles not written by pipeline — direct handler invocation bypassed event bus and evidence bundle writer

checks.message: No evidence bundles found at docs/evidence/swarm-dispatch/. The FSM was tested via direct handler invocation (not event bus), so the evidence bundle writer node did not fire. Full event-bus pipeline required to generate bundles.

checks.description: What was proven: FSM transitions, projection UPSERT, idempotency
checks.message: FSM (OMN-11961) and projection (OMN-11963) verified. Evidence bundle generation requires a full Kafka-connected integration run, which requires the dev lane effects runtime to be wired to swarm topics.

checks.description: What remains: full event-bus pipeline run
checks.message: node_projection_swarm is registered in runtime-effects profile. A Kafka publish to onex.cmd.omnimarket.swarm-dispatch.v1 would trigger the full chain. Deferred pending stability-test lane test run.
